excerpt: Curved of trunk, remover of every obstacle…

sections.label: Pallavi
sections.en:
O curved-trunked one of great form,
Ganesha who removes every obstacle.

sections.label: Anupallavi
sections.ta:
மோதக பிரியா முதல்வா
மங்கல காரியம் தொடங்குமுன் வணங்குவோம்
sections.translit:
mOdhaka priyA mudhalvA
mangala kAriyam thodangumun vaNanguvOm
sections.en:
First Lord, fond of the modak sweet;
we bow to you before any auspicious task begins.

notes: Ganesha, the elephant-headed son of Shiva, is worshipped at the start of every endeavour. The modak is his favourite sweet.
